title: Animated items (emissive)
description: Replaces default items' textures with animated and emissive ones.
body:
![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fab70b300204c5b261f7f3bf4fbd98dbacbf83f3_0.webp)

[![CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1171134?style=for-the-badge&logo=CurseForge&labelColor=16181C&color=F16436)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/animated-items-textures)
[![Linktree](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8e05ba6076f2a09de1434258f72867397b16f74.png)](https://linktr.ee/xivill)

For emissive textures
[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) is required!

# What’s in the Pack:

![ ](https://i.imgur.com/eLRlXDs.gif)


**ShivaKlans' Animated Textures** adds life to Minecraft by animating 42 commonly used items, all while keeping the game’s classic style. Future updates will bring even more!

(This is just a gif animations. The quality and smoothness of the textures in the game are much better)
